hypothesis: Within the `gated` mainline at `K=128, EF=12, optimizer=signum`, a conservative LR step down from `1.6e-3` to `1.2e-3` may improve stability and early-to-mid training curve smoothness enough to beat the current `0.149866` result; this round asks only whether the matched `gated` recipe is slightly overdriven at the reference LR.

I am not changing optimizer yet because LR remains the highest-value unresolved variable inside the current gated recipe.
notes_to_memory: Round 31 starts the gated LR sweep because the clean-baseline rerun was policy-rejected; first callback is downward to LR=1.2e-3 with all other recipe fields fixed.
